tEn: FastSpeech: Fast, Robust and Controllable Text to Speech
tZh: FastSpeech: 快速、鲁棒且可控的文本到语音合成
sEn: FastSpeech achieves 270x speedup in mel-spectrogram generation and 38x in end-to-end speech synthesis while maintaining quality and robustness.
sZh: FastSpeech在保持语音质量的同时，将梅尔频谱生成速度提升270倍，端到端语音合成速度提升38倍，并几乎消除了跳词和重复问题。
absEn: Neural network based end-to-end text to speech (TTS) has significantly improved the quality of synthesized speech. Prominent methods (e.g., Tacotron 2) usually first generate mel-spectrogram from text, and then synthesize speech from the mel-spectrogram using vocoder such as WaveNet. Compared with traditional concatenative and statistical parametric approaches, neural network based end-to-end models suffer from slow inference speed, and the synthesized speech is usually not robust (i.e., some words are skipped or repeated) and lack of controllability (voice speed or prosody control). In this work, we propose a novel feed-forward network based on Transformer to generate mel-spectrogram in parallel for TTS. Specifically, we extract attention alignments from an encoder-decoder based teacher model for phoneme duration prediction, which is used by a length regulator to expand the source phoneme sequence to match the length of the target mel-spectrogram sequence for parallel mel-spectrogram generation. Experiments on the LJSpeech dataset show that our parallel model matches autoregressive models in terms of speech quality, nearly eliminates the problem of word skipping and repeating in particularly hard cases, and can adjust voice speed smoothly. Most importantly, compared with autoregressive Transformer TTS, our model speeds up mel-spectrogram generation by 270x and the end-to-end speech synthesis by 38x. Therefore, we call our model FastSpeech.
absZh: 基于神经网络的端到端文本到语音合成（TTS）显著提高了合成语音的质量。主流方法（如Tacotron 2）通常先由文本生成梅尔频谱，再通过声码器（如WaveNet）合成语音。与传统拼接和统计参数方法相比，基于神经网络的端到端模型存在推理速度慢、合成语音鲁棒性差（如跳词或重复）以及缺乏可控性（如语速或韵律控制）等问题。本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型前馈网络，用于并行生成梅尔频谱。具体地，我们从基于编码器-解码器的教师模型中提取注意力对齐，用于音素时长预测，并通过长度调节器扩展源音素序列以匹配目标梅尔频谱序列的长度，从而实现并行梅尔频谱生成。在LJSpeech数据集上的实验表明，我们的并行模型在语音质量上与自回归模型相当，几乎消除了困难情况下的跳词和重复问题，并能平滑调整语速。最重要的是，与自回归Transformer TTS相比，我们的模型将梅尔频谱生成速度提升了270倍，端到端语音合成速度提升了38倍。因此，我们将该模型命名为FastSpeech。

contrib.en: Proposes FastSpeech, a feed-forward Transformer for parallel mel-spectrogram generation in TTS.
contrib.zh: 提出FastSpeech，一种用于TTS中并行生成梅尔频谱的前馈Transformer。

contrib.en: Introduces a length regulator with phoneme duration prediction for robust alignment.
contrib.zh: 引入带有音素时长预测的长度调节器，实现鲁棒对齐。

contrib.en: Achieves 270x speedup in mel-spectrogram generation and 38x in end-to-end synthesis.
contrib.zh: 在梅尔频谱生成上实现270倍加速，端到端合成加速38倍。

contrib.en: Nearly eliminates word skipping and repeating issues in hard cases.
contrib.zh: 在困难情况下几乎消除了跳词和重复词问题。

contrib.en: Enables smooth voice speed control from 0.5x to 1.5x.
contrib.zh: 支持从0.5倍到1.5倍的平滑语速控制。

contrib.en: Uses sequence-level knowledge distillation to improve speech quality.
contrib.zh: 使用序列级知识蒸馏提升语音质量。

limits.en: Speech quality only matches, not surpasses, autoregressive models.
limits.zh: 语音质量仅匹配自回归模型，未超越。

limits.en: Requires a pre-trained autoregressive teacher model for duration extraction.
limits.zh: 需要预训练的自回归教师模型来提取时长。

limits.en: Limited to single-speaker LJSpeech dataset; multi-speaker not tested.
limits.zh: 仅在单说话人LJSpeech数据集上测试，未验证多说话人场景。

limits.en: Prosody control is limited to adjusting breaks between words.
limits.zh: 韵律控制仅限于调整词间停顿。

limits.en: Dependence on external vocoder (WaveGlow) for final audio synthesis.
limits.zh: 依赖外部声码器（WaveGlow）进行最终音频合成。

items.en: Neural network based end-to-end text to speech (TTS) has significantly improved the quality of synthesized speech. Prominent methods (e.g., Tacotron 2) usually first generate mel-spectrogram from text, and then synthesize speech from the mel-spectrogram using vocoder such as WaveNet. Compared with traditional concatenative and statistical parametric approaches, neural network based end-to-end models suffer from slow inference speed, and the synthesized speech is usually not robust (i.e., some words are skipped or repeated) and lack of controllability (voice speed or prosody control). In this work, we propose a novel feed-forward network based on Transformer to generate mel-spectrogram in parallel for TTS. Specifically, we extract attention alignments from an encoder-decoder based teacher model for phoneme duration prediction, which is used by a length regulator to expand the source phoneme sequence to match the length of the target mel-spectrogram sequence for parallel mel-spectrogram generation. Experiments on the LJSpeech dataset show that our parallel model matches autoregressive models in terms of speech quality, nearly eliminates the problem of word skipping and repeating in particularly hard cases, and can adjust voice speed smoothly. Most importantly, compared with autoregressive Transformer TTS, our model speeds up mel-spectrogram generation by 270x and the end-to-end speech synthesis by 38x. Therefore, we call our model FastSpeech. 111Synthesized speech samples can be found in https://speechresearch.github.io/fastspeech/.
items.zh: 基于神经网络的端到端文本转语音（TTS）显著提升了合成语音的质量。主流方法（如 Tacotron 2）通常先由文本生成梅尔频谱图，再通过 WaveNet 等声码器从梅尔频谱图合成语音。与传统的拼接和统计参数方法相比，基于神经网络的端到端模型推理速度慢，合成语音通常不鲁棒（即某些词被跳过或重复），且缺乏可控性（语速或韵律控制）。本文提出一种基于 Transformer 的新型前馈网络，用于并行生成 TTS 的梅尔频谱图。具体而言，我们从基于编码器-解码器的教师模型中提取注意力对齐，用于音素时长预测，时长预测器通过长度调节器扩展源音素序列以匹配目标梅尔频谱图序列的长度，从而实现并行梅尔频谱图生成。在 LJSpeech 数据集上的实验表明，我们的并行模型在语音质量上与自回归模型相当，几乎消除了特别困难情况下的词跳过和重复问题，并能平滑调整语速。最重要的是，与自回归 Transformer TTS 相比，我们的模型将梅尔频谱图生成速度提升了 270 倍，端到端语音合成速度提升了 38 倍。因此，我们将模型命名为 FastSpeech。合成语音样本见 https://speechresearch.github.io/fastspeech/。

items.en: Text to speech (TTS) has attracted a lot of attention in recent years due to the advance in deep learning. Deep neural network based systems have become more and more popular for TTS, such as Tacotron [27], Tacotron 2 [22], Deep Voice 3 [19], and the fully end-to-end ClariNet [18]. Those models usually first generate mel-spectrogram autoregressively from text input and then synthesize speech from the mel-spectrogram using vocoder such as Griffin-Lim [6], WaveNet [24], Parallel WaveNet [16], or WaveGlow [20]222Although ClariNet [18] is fully end-to-end, it still first generates mel-spectrogram autoregressively and then synthesizes speech in one model.. Neural network based TTS has outperformed conventional concatenative and statistical parametric approaches [9, 28] in terms of speech quality.
items.zh: 近年来，由于深度学习的进步，文本转语音（TTS）受到了广泛关注。基于深度神经网络的系统在 TTS 中越来越流行，例如 Tacotron [27]、Tacotron 2 [22]、Deep Voice 3 [19] 以及完全端到端的 ClariNet [18]。这些模型通常首先从文本输入自回归生成梅尔频谱图，然后使用声码器（如 Griffin-Lim [6]、WaveNet [24]、Parallel WaveNet [16] 或 WaveGlow [20]）从梅尔频谱图合成语音。基于神经网络的 TTS 在语音质量上已超越传统的拼接和统计参数方法 [9, 28]。

items.en: In current neural network based TTS systems, mel-spectrogram is generated autoregressively. Due to the long sequence of the mel-spectrogram and the autoregressive nature, those systems face several challenges:
items.zh: 在当前基于神经网络的 TTS 系统中，梅尔频谱图是自回归生成的。由于梅尔频谱图序列较长且具有自回归性质，这些系统面临若干挑战：

items.en: Slow inference speed for mel-spectrogram generation. Although CNN and Transformer based TTS [19, 14] can speed up the training over RNN-based models [22], all models generate a mel-spectrogram conditioned on the previously generated mel-spectrograms and suffer from slow inference speed, given the mel-spectrogram sequence is usually with a length of hundreds or thousands.
items.zh: 梅尔频谱图生成推理速度慢。尽管基于 CNN 和 Transformer 的 TTS [19, 14] 可以加速训练，但所有模型都基于先前生成的梅尔频谱图来生成当前梅尔频谱图，由于梅尔频谱图序列通常有数百或数千的长度，推理速度较慢。

items.en: Synthesized speech is usually not robust. Due to error propagation [3] and the wrong attention alignments between text and speech in the autoregressive generation, the generated mel-spectrogram is usually deficient with the problem of words skipping and repeating [19].
items.zh: 合成语音通常不鲁棒。由于自回归生成中的错误传播 [3] 和文本与语音之间的错误注意力对齐，生成的梅尔频谱图通常存在词跳过和重复的问题 [19]。

items.en: Synthesized speech is lack of controllability. Previous autoregressive models generate mel-spectrograms one by one automatically, without explicitly leveraging the alignments between text and speech. As a consequence, it is usually hard to directly control the voice speed and prosody in the autoregressive generation.
items.zh: 合成语音缺乏可控性。以往的自回归模型自动逐个生成梅尔频谱图，没有显式利用文本与语音之间的对齐。因此，在自回归生成中通常难以直接控制语速和韵律。

items.en: Considering the monotonous alignment between text and speech, to speed up mel-spectrogram generation, in this work, we propose a novel model, FastSpeech, which takes a text (phoneme) sequence as input and generates mel-spectrograms non-autoregressively. It adopts a feed-forward network based on the self-attention in Transformer [25] and 1D convolution [5, 19, 11]. Since a mel-spectrogram sequence is much longer than its corresponding phoneme sequence, in order to solve the problem of length mismatch between the two sequences, FastSpeech adopts a length regulator that up-samples the phoneme sequence according to the phoneme duration (i.e., the number of mel-spectrograms that each phoneme corresponds to) to match the length of the mel-spectrogram sequence. The regulator is built on a phoneme duration predictor, which predicts the duration of each phoneme.
items.zh: 考虑到文本与语音之间的单调对齐，为了加速梅尔频谱图生成，本文提出一种新颖模型 FastSpeech，它以文本（音素）序列为输入，非自回归地生成梅尔频谱图。它采用基于 Transformer [25] 的自注意力和一维卷积 [5, 19, 11] 的前馈网络。由于梅尔频谱图序列远长于对应的音素序列，为了解决两个序列长度不匹配的问题，FastSpeech 采用长度调节器，根据音素时长（即每个音素对应的梅尔频谱图数量）对音素序列进行上采样，以匹配梅尔频谱图序列的长度。该调节器基于音素时长预测器，预测每个音素的时长。

items.en: Our proposed FastSpeech can address the above-mentioned three challenges as follows:
items.zh: 我们提出的 FastSpeech 可以解决上述三个挑战，具体如下：

items.en: Through parallel mel-spectrogram generation, FastSpeech greatly speeds up the synthesis process.
items.zh: 通过并行梅尔频谱图生成，FastSpeech 大大加速了合成过程。

items.en: Phoneme duration predictor ensures hard alignments between a phoneme and its mel-spectrograms, which is very different from soft and automatic attention alignments in the autoregressive models. Thus, FastSpeech avoids the issues of error propagation and wrong attention alignments, consequently reducing the ratio of the skipped words and repeated words.
items.zh: 音素时长预测器确保了音素与其梅尔频谱图之间的硬对齐，这与自回归模型中的软和自动注意力对齐非常不同。因此，FastSpeech 避免了错误传播和错误注意力对齐的问题，从而减少了跳过词和重复词的比例。

items.en: The length regulator can easily adjust voice speed by lengthening or shortening the phoneme duration to determine the length of the generated mel-spectrograms, and can also control part of the prosody by adding breaks between adjacent phonemes.
items.zh: 长度调节器可以通过延长或缩短音素时长来轻松调整语速，从而确定生成的梅尔频谱图长度，还可以通过在相邻音素之间添加停顿来控制部分韵律。

items.en: We conduct experiments on the LJSpeech dataset to test FastSpeech. The results show that in terms of speech quality, FastSpeech nearly matches the autoregressive Transformer model. Furthermore, FastSpeech achieves 270x speedup on mel-spectrogram generation and 38x speedup on final speech synthesis compared with the autoregressive Transformer TTS model, almost eliminates the problem of word skipping and repeating, and can adjust voice speed smoothly. We attach some audio files generated by our method in the supplementary materials.
items.zh: 我们在 LJSpeech 数据集上进行实验以测试 FastSpeech。结果表明，在语音质量方面，FastSpeech 几乎与自回归 Transformer 模型相当。此外，与自回归 Transformer TTS 模型相比，FastSpeech 在梅尔频谱图生成上实现了 270 倍加速，在最终语音合成上实现了 38 倍加速，几乎消除了词跳过和重复的问题，并能平滑调整语速。我们在补充材料中附上了由我们的方法生成的一些音频文件。

items.en: In this section, we briefly overview the background of this work, including text to speech, sequence to sequence learning, and non-autoregressive sequence generation.
items.zh: 本节简要概述本文的背景，包括文本转语音、序列到序列学习以及非自回归序列生成。

items.en: TTS [1, 27, 22, 18, 21], which aims to synthesize natural and intelligible speech given text, has long been a hot research topic in the field of artificial intelligence. The research on TTS has shifted from early concatenative synthesis [9], statistical parametric synthesis [28, 13] to neural network based parametric synthesis [1] and end-to-end models [27, 22, 14, 18], and the quality of the synthesized speech by end-to-end models is close to human parity. Neural network based end-to-end TTS models usually first convert the text to acoustic features (e.g., mel-spectrograms) and then transform mel-spectrograms into audio samples. However, most neural TTS systems generate mel-spectrograms autoregressively, which suffers from slow inference speed, and synthesized speech usually lacks of robustness (word skipping and repeating) and controllability (voice speed or prosody control). In this work, we propose FastSpeech to generate mel-spectrograms non-autoregressively, which sufficiently handles the above problems.
items.zh: TTS [1, 27, 22, 18, 21] 旨在根据文本合成自然且可理解的语音，长期以来一直是人工智能领域的热门研究课题。TTS 的研究已从早期的拼接合成 [9]、统计参数合成 [28, 13] 转向基于神经网络的参数合成 [1] 和端到端模型 [27, 22, 14, 18]，端到端模型合成的语音质量已接近人类水平。基于神经网络的端到端 TTS 模型通常首先将文本转换为声学特征（如梅尔频谱图），然后将梅尔频谱图转换为音频样本。然而，大多数神经 TTS 系统自回归生成梅尔频谱图，这导致推理速度慢，合成语音通常缺乏鲁棒性（词跳过和重复）和可控性（语速或韵律控制）。本文提出 FastSpeech 以非自回归方式生成梅尔频谱图，充分解决了上述问题。

items.en: Sequence to sequence learning [2, 4, 25] is usually built on the encoder-decoder framework: The encoder takes the source sequence as input and generates a set of representations. After that, the decoder estimates the conditional probability of each target element given the source representations and its preceding elements. The attention mechanism [2] is further introduced between the encoder and decoder in order to find which source representations to focus on when predicting the current element, and is an important component for sequence to sequence learning.
items.zh: 序列到序列学习 [2, 4, 25] 通常建立在编码器-解码器框架上：编码器将源序列作为输入并生成一组表示。之后，解码器根据源表示及其前面的元素估计每个目标元素的条件概率。注意力机制 [2] 进一步引入编码器和解码器之间，以确定在预测当前元素时应关注哪些源表示，是序列到序列学习的重要组成部分。

items.en: In this work, instead of using the conventional encoder-attention-decoder framework for sequence to sequence learning, we propose a feed-forward network to generate a sequence in parallel.
items.zh: 本文中，我们没有使用传统的编码器-注意力-解码器框架进行序列到序列学习，而是提出一种前馈网络来并行生成序列。

items.en: Unlike autoregressive sequence generation, non-autoregressive models generate sequence in parallel, without explicitly depending on the previous elements, which can greatly speed up the inference process. Non-autoregressive generation has been studied in some sequence generation tasks such as neural machine translation [7, 8, 26] and audio synthesis [16, 18, 20]. Our FastSpeech differs from the above works in two aspects: 1) Previous works adopt non-autoregressive generation in neural machine translation or audio synthesis mainly for inference speedup, while FastSpeech focuses on both inference speedup and improving the robustness and controllability of the synthesized speech in TTS. 2) For TTS, although Parallel WaveNet [16], ClariNet [18] and WaveGlow [20] generate audio in parallel, they are conditioned on mel-spectrograms, which are still generated autoregressively. Therefore, they do not address the challenges considered in this work. There is a concurrent work [17] that also generates mel-spectrogram in parallel. However, it still adopts the encoder-decoder framework with attention mechanism, which 1) requires 2∼similar-to\sim3x model parameters compared with the teacher model and thus achieves slower inference speedup than FastSpeech; 2) cannot totally solve the problems of word skipping and repeating while FastSpeech nearly eliminates these issues.
items.zh: 与自回归序列生成不同，非自回归模型并行生成序列，不显式依赖于前面的元素，这可以大大加速推理过程。非自回归生成已在一些序列生成任务中得到研究，如神经机器翻译 [7, 8, 26] 和音频合成 [16, 18, 20]。我们的 FastSpeech 与上述工作有两个不同之处：1) 以往的工作在神经机器翻译或音频合成中采用非自回归生成主要是为了推理加速，而 FastSpeech 同时关注推理加速以及提高 TTS 中合成语音的鲁棒性和可控性。2) 对于 TTS，尽管 Parallel WaveNet [16]、ClariNet [18] 和 WaveGlow [20] 并行生成音频，但它们以梅尔频谱图为条件，而梅尔频谱图仍然是自回归生成的。因此，它们没有解决本文考虑的挑战。有一项并行工作 [17] 也并行生成梅尔频谱图。然而，它仍然采用带有注意力机制的编码器-解码器框架，这 1) 需要比教师模型多 2∼3 倍的模型参数，因此推理加速比 FastSpeech 慢；2) 不能完全解决词跳过和重复的问题，而 FastSpeech 几乎消除了这些问题。

items.en: In this section, we introduce the architecture design of FastSpeech. To generate a target mel-spectrogram sequence in parallel, we design a novel feed-forward structure, instead of using the encoder-attention-decoder based architecture as adopted by most sequence to sequence based autoregressive [25, 22, 14] and non-autoregressive [7, 8, 26] generation. The overall model architecture of FastSpeech is shown in Figure 1. We describe the components in detail in the following subsections.
items.zh: 本节介绍 FastSpeech 的架构设计。为了并行生成目标梅尔频谱图序列，我们设计了一种新颖的前馈结构，而不是采用大多数基于序列到序列的自回归 [25, 22, 14] 和非自回归 [7, 8, 26] 生成所使用的编码器-注意力-解码器架构。FastSpeech 的整体模型架构如图 1 所示。我们在以下小节中详细描述各个组件。

items.en: The architecture for FastSpeech is a feed-forward structure based on self-attention in Transformer [25] and 1D convolution [5, 19]. We call this structure as Feed-Forward Transformer (FFT), as shown in Figure 1(a). Feed-Forward Transformer stacks multiple FFT blocks for phoneme to mel-spectrogram transformation, with N𝑁N blocks on the phoneme side, and N𝑁N blocks on the mel-spectrogram side, with a length regulator (which will be described in the next subsection) in between to bridge the length gap between the phoneme and mel-spectrogram sequence. Each FFT block consists of a self-attention and 1D convolutional network, as shown in Figure 1(b). The self-attention network consists of a multi-head attention to extract the cross-position information. Different from the 2-layer dense network in Transformer, we use a 2-layer 1D convolutional network with ReLU activation. The motivation is that the adjacent hidden states are more closely related in the character/phoneme and mel-spectrogram sequence in speech tasks. We evaluate the effectiveness of the 1D convolutional network in the experimental section. Following Transformer [25], residual connections, layer normalization, and dropout are added after the self-attention network and 1D convolutional network respectively.
items.zh: FastSpeech 的架构是一种基于 Transformer [25] 中的自注意力机制和一维卷积 [5, 19] 的前馈结构。我们将这种结构称为前馈 Transformer（FFT），如图 1(a) 所示。前馈 Transformer 堆叠多个 FFT 块，用于音素到梅尔频谱图的转换，音素侧有 N 个块，梅尔频谱图侧有 N 个块，中间有一个长度调节器（将在下一小节中描述）来桥接音素序列和梅尔频谱图序列之间的长度差距。每个 FFT 块由一个自注意力网络和一个一维卷积网络组成，如图 1(b) 所示。自注意力网络包含一个多头注意力机制，用于提取跨位置信息。与 Transformer 中的 2 层密集网络不同，我们使用一个带有 ReLU 激活函数的 2 层一维卷积网络。其动机是，在语音任务中，字符/音素和梅尔频谱图序列中相邻的隐藏状态更相关。我们在实验部分评估了一维卷积网络的有效性。遵循 Transformer [25]，在自注意力网络和一维卷积网络之后分别添加了残差连接、层归一化和 dropout。

items.en: The length regulator (Figure 1(c)) is used to solve the problem of length mismatch between the phoneme and spectrogram sequence in the Feed-Forward Transformer, as well as to control the voice speed and part of prosody. The length of a phoneme sequence is usually smaller than that of its mel-spectrogram sequence, and each phoneme corresponds to several mel-spectrograms. We refer to the length of the mel-spectrograms that corresponds to a phoneme as the phoneme duration (we will describe how to predict phoneme duration in the next subsection). Based on the phoneme duration d𝑑d, the length regulator expands the hidden states of the phoneme sequence d𝑑d times, and then the total length of the hidden states equals the length of the mel-spectrograms. Denote the hidden states of the phoneme sequence as ℋp​h​o=[h1,h2,…,hn]subscriptℋ𝑝ℎ𝑜subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ2…subscriptℎ𝑛\mathcal{H}_{pho}=[h_{1},h_{2},...,h_{n}], where n𝑛n is the length of the sequence. Denote the phoneme duration sequence as 𝒟=[d1,d2,…,dn]𝒟subscript𝑑1subscript𝑑2…subscript𝑑𝑛\mathcal{D}=[d_{1},d_{2},...,d_{n}], where Σi=1n​di=msubscriptsuperscriptΣ𝑛𝑖1subscript𝑑𝑖𝑚\Sigma^{n}_{i=1}d_{i}=m and m𝑚m is the length of the mel-spectrogram sequence. We denote the length regulator ℒ​ℛℒℛ\mathcal{LR} as
items.zh: 长度调节器（图 1(c)）用于解决前馈 Transformer 中音素序列和频谱图序列长度不匹配的问题，以及控制语速和部分韵律。音素序列的长度通常小于其梅尔频谱图序列的长度，每个音素对应多个梅尔频谱图。我们将一个音素对应的梅尔频谱图长度称为音素时长（我们将在下一小节中描述如何预测音素时长）。基于音素时长 d，长度调节器将音素序列的隐藏状态扩展 d 倍，然后隐藏状态的总长度等于梅尔频谱图的长度。将音素序列的隐藏状态记为 ℋ_pho = [h1, h2, ..., hn]，其中 n 是序列的长度。将音素时长序列记为 𝒟 = [d1, d2, ..., dn]，其中 Σ_{i=1}^n d_i = m，m 是梅尔频谱图序列的长度。我们将长度调节器 ℒℛ 定义为

items.en: where α𝛼\alpha is a hyperparameter to determine the length of the expanded sequence ℋm​e​lsubscriptℋ𝑚𝑒𝑙\mathcal{H}_{mel}, thereby controlling the voice speed. For example, given ℋp​h​o=[h1,h2,h3,h4]subscriptℋ𝑝ℎ𝑜subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ4\mathcal{H}_{pho}=[h_{1},h_{2},h_{3},h_{4}] and the corresponding phoneme duration sequence 𝒟=[2,2,3,1]𝒟2231\mathcal{D}=[2,2,3,1], the expanded sequence ℋm​e​lsubscriptℋ𝑚𝑒𝑙\mathcal{H}_{mel} based on Equation 1 becomes [h1,h1,h2,h2,h3,h3,h3,h4]subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ4[h_{1},h_{1},h_{2},h_{2},h_{3},h_{3},h_{3},h_{4}] if α=1𝛼1\alpha=1 (normal speed). When α=1.3𝛼1.3\alpha=1.3 (slow speed) and 0.50.50.5 (fast speed), the duration sequences become 𝒟α=1.3=[2.6,2.6,3.9,1.3]≈[3,3,4,1]subscript𝒟𝛼1.32.62.63.91.33341\mathcal{D}_{\alpha=1.3}=[2.6,2.6,3.9,1.3]\approx[3,3,4,1] and 𝒟α=0.5=[1,1,1.5,0.5]≈[1,1,2,1]subscript𝒟𝛼0.5111.50.51121\mathcal{D}_{\alpha=0.5}=[1,1,1.5,0.5]\approx[1,1,2,1], and the expanded sequences become [h1,h1,h1,h2,h2,h2,h3,h3,h3,h3,h4]subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ4[h_{1},h_{1},h_{1},h_{2},h_{2},h_{2},h_{3},h_{3},h_{3},h_{3},h_{4}] and [h1,h2,h3,h3,h4]subscriptℎ1subscriptℎ2subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ3subscriptℎ4[h_{1},h_{2},h_{3},h_{3},h_{4}] respectively. We can also control the break between words by adjusting the duration of the space characters in the sentence, so as to adjust part of prosody of the synthesized speech.
items.zh: 其中 α 是一个超参数，用于确定扩展序列 ℋ_mel 的长度，从而控制语速。例如，给定 ℋ_pho = [h1, h2, h3, h4] 和对应的音素时长序列 𝒟 = [2,2,3,1]，基于公式 1 的扩展序列 ℋ_mel 在 α=1（正常速度）时变为 [h1, h1, h2, h2, h3, h3, h3, h4]。当 α=1.3（慢速）和 0.5（快速）时，时长序列变为 𝒟_{α=1.3} = [2.6,2.6,3.9,1.3] ≈ [3,3,4,1] 和 𝒟_{α=0.5} = [1,1,1.5,0.5] ≈ [1,1,2,1]，扩展序列分别变为 [h1, h1, h1, h2, h2, h2, h3, h3, h3, h3, h4] 和 [h1, h2, h3, h3, h4]。我们还可以通过调整句子中空格字符的时长来控制单词之间的停顿，从而调整合成语音的部分韵律。

items.en: Phoneme duration prediction is important for the length regulator. As shown in Figure 1(d), the duration predictor consists of a 2-layer 1D convolutional network with ReLU activation, each followed by the layer normalization and the dropout layer, and an extra linear layer to output a scalar, which is exactly the predicted phoneme duration. Note that this module is stacked on top of the FFT blocks on the phoneme side and is jointly trained with the FastSpeech model to predict the length of mel-spectrograms for each phoneme with the mean square error (MSE) loss. We predict the length in the logarithmic domain, which makes them more Gaussian and easier to train. Note that the trained duration predictor is only used in the TTS inference phase, because we can directly use the phoneme duration extracted from an autoregressive teacher model in training (see following discussions).
items.zh: 音素时长预测对于长度调节器很重要。如图 1(d) 所示，时长预测器由一个带有 ReLU 激活函数的 2 层一维卷积网络组成，每层之后是层归一化和 dropout 层，以及一个额外的线性层来输出一个标量，即预测的音素时长。注意，该模块堆叠在音素侧的 FFT 块之上，并与 FastSpeech 模型联合训练，以使用均方误差（MSE）损失预测每个音素的梅尔频谱图长度。我们在对数域中预测长度，这使其更接近高斯分布且更易于训练。注意，训练好的时长预测器仅在 TTS 推理阶段使用，因为在训练中我们可以直接使用从自回归教师模型中提取的音素时长（见后续讨论）。

items.en: In order to train the duration predictor, we extract the ground-truth phoneme duration from an autoregressive teacher TTS model, as shown in Figure 1d. We describe the detailed steps as follows:
items.zh: 为了训练时长预测器，我们从自回归教师 TTS 模型中提取真实的音素时长，如图 1d 所示。详细步骤如下：

items.en: We first train an autoregressive encoder-attention-decoder based Transformer TTS model following [14].
items.zh: 我们首先按照 [14] 训练一个基于自回归编码器-注意力-解码器的 Transformer TTS 模型。

items.en: For each training sequence pair, we extract the decoder-to-encoder attention alignments from the trained teacher model. There are multiple attention alignments due to the multi-head self-attention [25], and not all attention heads demonstrate the diagonal property (the phoneme and mel-spectrogram sequence are monotonously aligned). We propose a focus rate F𝐹F to measure how an attention head is close to diagonal: F=1S​∑s=1Smax1≤t≤T⁡as,t𝐹1𝑆superscriptsubscript𝑠1𝑆subscript1𝑡𝑇subscript𝑎𝑠𝑡F=\frac{1}{S}\sum_{s=1}^{S}{\max_{1\leq t\leq T}a_{s,t}},
items.zh: 对于每个训练序列对，我们从训练好的教师模型中提取解码器到编码器的注意力对齐。由于多头自注意力机制 [25]，存在多个注意力对齐，且并非所有注意力头都表现出对角特性（音素和梅尔频谱图序列单调对齐）。我们提出一个聚焦率 F 来衡量注意力头接近对角线的程度：F = (1/S) Σ_{s=1}^S max_{1≤t≤T} a_{s,t}，

items.en: where S𝑆S and T𝑇T are the lengths of the ground-truth spectrograms and phonemes, as,tsubscript𝑎𝑠𝑡a_{s,t} donates the element in the s𝑠s-th row and t𝑡t-th column of the attention matrix. We compute the focus rate for each head and choose the head with the largest F𝐹F as the attention alignments.
items.zh: 其中 S 和 T 分别是真实频谱图和音素的长度，a_{s,t} 表示注意力矩阵中第 s 行第 t 列的元素。我们计算每个头的聚焦率，并选择 F 最大的头作为注意力对齐。

items.en: Finally, we extract the phoneme duration sequence 𝒟=[d1,d2,…,dn]𝒟subscript𝑑1subscript𝑑2…subscript𝑑𝑛\mathcal{D}=[d_{1},d_{2},...,d_{n}] according to the duration extractor di=∑s=1S[arg⁡maxtas,t=i]subscript𝑑𝑖superscriptsubscript𝑠1𝑆delimited-[]subscript𝑡subscript𝑎𝑠𝑡𝑖d_{i}=\sum_{s=1}^{S}[\mathop{\arg\max}_{t}a_{s,t}=i]. That is, the duration of a phoneme is the number of mel-spectrograms attended to it according to the attention head selected in the above step.
items.zh: 最后，我们根据时长提取器 d_i = Σ_{s=1}^S [argmax_t a_{s,t} = i] 提取音素时长序列 𝒟 = [d1, d2, ..., dn]。也就是说，一个音素的时长是根据上一步选择的注意力头，该音素所关注的梅尔频谱图的数量。

items.en: We conduct experiments on LJSpeech dataset [10], which contains 13,100 English audio clips and the corresponding text transcripts, with the total audio length of approximate 24 hours. We randomly split the dataset into 3 sets: 12500 samples for training, 300 samples for validation and 300 samples for testing. In order to alleviate the mispronunciation problem, we convert the text sequence into the phoneme sequence with our internal grapheme-to-phoneme conversion tool [23], following [1, 27, 22]. For the speech data, we convert the raw waveform into mel-spectrograms following [22]. Our frame size and hop size are set to 1024 and 256, respectively.
items.zh: 我们在 LJSpeech 数据集 [10] 上进行实验，该数据集包含 13,100 个英语音频片段及其对应的文本转录，总音频时长约为 24 小时。我们将数据集随机分为 3 组：12,500 个样本用于训练，300 个样本用于验证，300 个样本用于测试。为了缓解发音错误问题，我们使用内部字形到音素转换工具 [23] 将文本序列转换为音素序列，遵循 [1, 27, 22]。对于语音数据，我们按照 [22] 将原始波形转换为梅尔频谱图。帧大小和跳跃大小分别设置为 1024 和 256。

items.en: In order to evaluate the robustness of our proposed FastSpeech, we also choose 50 sentences which are particularly hard for TTS system, following the practice in [19].
items.zh: 为了评估我们提出的 FastSpeech 的鲁棒性，我们还按照 [19] 中的做法，选择了 50 个对 TTS 系统特别困难的句子。

items.en: Our FastSpeech model consists of 6 FFT blocks on both the phoneme side and the mel-spectrogram side. The size of the phoneme vocabulary is 51, including punctuations. The dimension of phoneme embeddings, the hidden size of the self-attention and 1D convolution in the FFT block are all set to 384. The number of attention heads is set to 2. The kernel sizes of the 1D convolution in the 2-layer convolutional network are both set to 3, with input/output size of 384/1536 for the first layer and 1536/384 in the second layer. The output linear layer converts the 384-dimensional hidden into 80-dimensional mel-spectrogram. In our duration predictor, the kernel sizes of the 1D convolution are set to 3, with input/output sizes of 384/384 for both layers.
items.zh: 我们的 FastSpeech 模型在音素侧和梅尔频谱图侧各有 6 个 FFT 块。音素词汇表的大小为 51，包括标点符号。音素嵌入的维度、FFT 块中自注意力和一维卷积的隐藏大小均设置为 384。注意力头的数量设置为 2。2 层卷积网络中一维卷积的核大小均设置为 3，第一层的输入/输出大小为 384/1536，第二层为 1536/384。输出线性层将 384 维的隐藏状态转换为 80 维的梅尔频谱图。在我们的时长预测器中，一维卷积的核大小设置为 3，两层的输入/输出大小均为 384/384。

items.en: The autoregressive Transformer TTS model serves two purposes in our work: 1) to extract the phoneme duration as the target to train the duration predictor; 2) to generate mel-spectrogram in the sequence-level knowledge distillation (which will be introduced in the next subsection). We refer to [14] for the configurations of this model, which consists of a 6-layer encoder, a 6-layer decoder, except that we use 1D convolution network instead of position-wise FFN. The number of parameters of this teacher model is similar to that of our FastSpeech model.
items.zh: 自回归 Transformer TTS 模型在我们的工作中起到两个作用：1) 提取音素时长作为训练时长预测器的目标；2) 在序列级知识蒸馏（将在下一小节中介绍）中生成梅尔频谱图。该模型的配置参考 [14]，包括一个 6 层编码器和一个 6 层解码器，不同之处在于我们使用一维卷积网络代替逐位置的前馈网络。该教师模型的参数数量与我们的 FastSpeech 模型相似。

items.en: We first train the autoregressive Transformer TTS model on 4 NVIDIA V100 GPUs, with batchsize of 16 sentences on each GPU. We use the Adam optimizer with β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.98subscript𝛽20.98\beta_{2}=0.98, ε=10−9𝜀superscript109\varepsilon=10^{-9} and follow the same learning rate schedule in [25]. It takes 80k steps for training until convergence. We feed the text and speech pairs in the training set to the model again to obtain the encoder-decoder attention alignments, which are used to train the duration predictor. In addition, we also leverage sequence-level knowledge distillation [12] that has achieved good performance in non-autoregressive machine translation [7, 8, 26] to transfer the knowledge from the teacher model to the student model. For each source text sequence, we generate the mel-spectrograms with the autoregressive Transformer TTS model and take the source text and the generated mel-spectrograms as the paired data for FastSpeech model training.
items.zh: 我们首先在 4 块 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上训练自回归 Transformer TTS 模型，每个 GPU 的批大小为 16 个句子。我们使用 Adam 优化器，β1=0.9，β2=0.98，ε=10^{-9}，并遵循 [25] 中的相同学习率调度。训练需要 80k 步直到收敛。我们将训练集中的文本和语音对再次输入模型，以获得编码器-解码器注意力对齐，用于训练时长预测器。此外，我们还利用序列级知识蒸馏 [12]，该方法在非自回归机器翻译 [7, 8, 26] 中取得了良好性能，将知识从教师模型转移到学生模型。对于每个源文本序列，我们使用自回归 Transformer TTS 模型生成梅尔频谱图，并将源文本和生成的梅尔频谱图作为配对数据用于 FastSpeech 模型训练。

items.en: We train the FastSpeech model together with the duration predictor. The optimizer and other hyper-parameters for FastSpeech are the same as the autoregressive Transformer TTS model. The FastSpeech model training takes about 80k steps on 4 NVIDIA V100 GPUs. In the inference process, the output mel-spectrograms of our FastSpeech model are transformed into audio samples using the pretrained WaveGlow [20]333https://github.com/NVIDIA/waveglow.
items.zh: 我们联合训练 FastSpeech 模型和时长预测器。FastSpeech 的优化器和其他超参数与自回归 Transformer TTS 模型相同。FastSpeech 模型训练在 4 块 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上大约需要 80k 步。在推理过程中，FastSpeech 模型输出的梅尔频谱图使用预训练的 WaveGlow [20] 转换为音频样本。

items.en: In this section, we evaluate the performance of FastSpeech in terms of audio quality, inference speedup, robustness, and controllability.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们从音频质量、推理加速、鲁棒性和可控性方面评估 FastSpeech 的性能。

items.en: We conduct the MOS (mean opinion score) evaluation on the test set to measure the audio quality. We keep the text content consistent among different models so as to exclude other interference factors, only examining the audio quality. Each audio is listened by at least 20 testers, who are all native English speakers. We compare the MOS of the generated audio samples by our FastSpeech model with other systems, which include 1) GT, the ground truth audio; 2) GT (Mel + WaveGlow), where we first convert the ground truth audio into mel-spectrograms, and then convert the mel-spectrograms back to audio using WaveGlow; 3) Tacotron 2 [22] (Mel + WaveGlow); 4) Transformer TTS [14] (Mel + WaveGlow). 5) Merlin [28] (WORLD), a popular parametric TTS system with WORLD [15] as the vocoder. The results are shown in Table 1. It can be seen that our FastSpeech can nearly match the quality of the Transformer TTS model and Tacotron 2 444According to our further comprehensive experiments on our internal datasets, the voice quality of FastSpeech can always match that of the teacher model on multiple languages and multiple voices, if we use more unlabeled text for knowledge distillation..
items.zh: 我们在测试集上进行 MOS（平均意见得分）评估以衡量音频质量。我们保持不同模型之间的文本内容一致，以排除其他干扰因素，仅检查音频质量。每个音频由至少 20 名测试者收听，他们都是英语母语者。我们将 FastSpeech 模型生成的音频样本的 MOS 与其他系统进行比较，包括 1) GT，真实音频；2) GT (Mel + WaveGlow)，我们首先将真实音频转换为梅尔频谱图，然后使用 WaveGlow 将梅尔频谱图转换回音频；3) Tacotron 2 [22] (Mel + WaveGlow)；4) Transformer TTS [14] (Mel + WaveGlow)；5) Merlin [28] (WORLD)，一种流行的参数化 TTS 系统，使用 WORLD [15] 作为声码器。结果如表 1 所示。可以看出，我们的 FastSpeech 几乎可以匹配 Transformer TTS 模型和 Tacotron 2 的质量。

items.en: We evaluate the inference latency of FastSpeech compared with the autoregressive Transformer TTS model, which has similar number of model parameters with FastSpeech. We first show the inference speedup for mel-spectrogram generation in Table 2. It can be seen that FastSpeech speeds up the mel-spectrogram generation by 269.40x, compared with the Transformer TTS model. We then show the end-to-end speedup when using WaveGlow as the vocoder. It can be seen that FastSpeech can still achieve 38.30x speedup for audio generation.
items.zh: 我们评估了 FastSpeech 与自回归 Transformer TTS 模型（参数数量与 FastSpeech 相似）的推理延迟。我们首先在表 2 中展示了梅尔频谱图生成的推理加速。可以看出，与 Transformer TTS 模型相比，FastSpeech 将梅尔频谱图生成速度提高了 269.40 倍。然后我们展示了使用 WaveGlow 作为声码器时的端到端加速。可以看出，FastSpeech 在音频生成方面仍能实现 38.30 倍的加速。

items.en: We also visualize the relationship between the inference latency and the length of the predicted mel-spectrogram sequence in the test set. Figure 2 shows that the inference latency barely increases with the length of the predicted mel-spectrogram for FastSpeech, while increases largely in Transformer TTS. This indicates that the inference speed of our method is not sensitive to the length of generated audio due to parallel generation.
items.zh: 我们还可视化了测试集中推理延迟与预测的梅尔频谱序列长度之间的关系。图2显示，对于FastSpeech，推理延迟几乎不随预测的梅尔频谱长度增加，而Transformer TTS则大幅增加。这表明由于并行生成，我们的方法的推理速度对生成音频的长度不敏感。

items.en: The encoder-decoder attention mechanism in the autoregressive model may cause wrong attention alignments between phoneme and mel-spectrogram, resulting in instability with word repeating and word skipping. To evaluate the robustness of FastSpeech, we select 50 sentences which are particularly hard for TTS system555These cases include single letters, spellings, repeated numbers, and long sentences. We list the cases in the supplementary materials.. Word error counts are listed in Table 3. It can be seen that Transformer TTS is not robust to these hard cases and gets 34% error rate, while FastSpeech can effectively eliminate word repeating and skipping to improve intelligibility.
items.zh: 自回归模型中的编码器-解码器注意力机制可能导致音素和梅尔频谱之间的错误注意力对齐，从而引起单词重复和跳词的稳定性问题。为了评估FastSpeech的鲁棒性，我们选择了50个对TTS系统特别困难的句子。单词错误计数列于表3。可以看出，Transformer TTS对这些困难案例不鲁棒，错误率为34%，而FastSpeech可以有效消除单词重复和跳词，提高可懂度。

items.en: As mentioned in Section 3.2, FastSpeech can control the voice speed as well as part of the prosody by adjusting the phoneme duration, which cannot be supported by other end-to-end TTS systems. We show the mel-spectrograms before and after the length control, and also put the audio samples in the supplementary material for reference.
items.zh: 如第3.2节所述，FastSpeech可以通过调整音素持续时间来控制语速以及部分韵律，这是其他端到端TTS系统无法支持的。我们展示了长度控制前后的梅尔频谱，并在补充材料中提供了音频样本以供参考。

items.en: Voice Speed The generated mel-spectrograms with different voice speeds by lengthening or shortening the phoneme duration are shown in Figure 3. We also attach several audio samples in the supplementary material for reference. As demonstrated by the samples, FastSpeech can adjust the voice speed from 0.5x to 1.5x smoothly, with stable and almost unchanged pitch.
items.zh: 语速 通过延长或缩短音素持续时间生成的不同语速的梅尔频谱如图3所示。我们还在补充材料中附上了几个音频样本以供参考。如样本所示，FastSpeech可以平滑地将语速从0.5倍调整到1.5倍，音高稳定且几乎不变。

items.en: Breaks Between Words FastSpeech can add breaks between adjacent words by lengthening the duration of the space characters in the sentence, which can improve the prosody of voice. We show an example in Figure 4, where we add breaks in two positions of the sentence to improve the prosody.
items.zh: 词间停顿 FastSpeech可以通过延长句子中空格字符的持续时间来在相邻单词之间添加停顿，从而改善语音的韵律。我们在图4中展示了一个示例，在句子的两个位置添加停顿以改善韵律。

items.capZh: (b) 添加停顿后的梅尔频谱

items.en: We conduct ablation studies to verify the effectiveness of several components in FastSpeech, including 1D Convolution and sequence-level knowledge distillation. We conduct CMOS evaluation for these ablation studies.
items.zh: 我们进行了消融研究，以验证FastSpeech中几个组件的有效性，包括一维卷积和序列级知识蒸馏。我们对这些消融研究进行了CMOS评估。

items.en: 1D Convolution in FFT Block We propose to replace the original fully connected layer (adopted in Transformer [25]) with 1D convolution in FFT block, as described in Section 3.1. Here we conduct experiments to compare the performance of 1D convolution to the fully connected layer with similar number of parameters. As shown in Table 4, replacing 1D convolution with fully connected layer results in -0.113 CMOS, which demonstrates the effectiveness of 1D convolution.
items.zh: FFT块中的一维卷积 我们提出用一维卷积替换FFT块中原始的全连接层（如Transformer [25]中所采用），如第3.1节所述。这里我们进行实验，比较一维卷积与参数数量相似的全连接层的性能。如表4所示，用全连接层替换一维卷积导致-0.113 CMOS，这证明了一维卷积的有效性。

items.en: Sequence-Level Knowledge Distillation As described in Section 4.3, we leverage sequence-level knowledge distillation for FastSpeech. We conduct CMOS evaluation to compare the performance of FastSpeech with and without sequence-level knowledge distillation, as shown in Table 4. We find that removing sequence-level knowledge distillation results in -0.325 CMOS, which demonstrates the effectiveness of sequence-level knowledge distillation.
items.zh: 序列级知识蒸馏 如第4.3节所述，我们利用序列级知识蒸馏用于FastSpeech。我们进行CMOS评估，比较有和没有序列级知识蒸馏的FastSpeech的性能，如表4所示。我们发现去除序列级知识蒸馏导致-0.325 CMOS，这证明了序列级知识蒸馏的有效性。

items.en: In this work, we have proposed FastSpeech: a fast, robust and controllable neural TTS system. FastSpeech has a novel feed-forward network to generate mel-spectrogram in parallel, which consists of several key components including feed-forward Transformer blocks, a length regulator and a duration predictor. Experiments on LJSpeech dataset demonstrate that our proposed FastSpeech can nearly match the autoregressive Transformer TTS model in terms of speech quality, speed up the mel-spectrogram generation by 270x and the end-to-end speech synthesis by 38x, almost eliminate the problem of word skipping and repeating, and can adjust voice speed (0.5x-1.5x) smoothly.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了FastSpeech：一个快速、鲁棒且可控的神经TTS系统。FastSpeech具有新颖的前馈网络，可以并行生成梅尔频谱，该网络由几个关键组件组成，包括前馈Transformer块、长度调节器和持续时间预测器。在LJSpeech数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的FastSpeech在语音质量方面几乎可以匹配自回归Transformer TTS模型，将梅尔频谱生成速度提高270倍，端到端语音合成速度提高38倍，几乎消除了单词跳词和重复的问题，并且可以平滑地调整语速（0.5倍-1.5倍）。

items.en: For future work, we will continue to improve the quality of the synthesized speech, and apply FastSpeech to multi-speaker and low-resource settings. We will also train FastSpeech jointly with a parallel neural vocoder to make it fully end-to-end and parallel.
items.zh: 对于未来的工作，我们将继续提高合成语音的质量，并将FastSpeech应用于多说话人和低资源设置。我们还将联合训练FastSpeech与并行神经声码器，使其完全端到端和并行。

items.en: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China under Grant No.61602405, No.61836002. This work was also supported by the China Knowledge Centre of Engineering Sciences and Technology.
items.zh: 这项工作得到了国家自然科学基金（批准号：61602405、61836002）的支持。这项工作也得到了中国工程科技知识中心的支持。
